name: NANSO Transport Co.,Ltd.
summary: NANSO Transport Co.,Ltd. provides logistics services in Japan. The company engages in the provision of railroad transportation, general freight car transportation, special assortment freight transportation, car transportation handling, light vehicle transportation, warehouse/tenant, security, parking lot, general worker dispatch, automobile maintenance, and general charter passenger car and specified passenger car transportation services. It also offers non-life insurance; real estate transaction and leasing; travel; general and industrial waste treatment; building cleaning; nursing and day care; and employment placement services, as well as agency services. NANSO Transport Co.,Ltd. was incorporated in 1942 and is headquartered in Togane, Japan.
